summary: Kang Hyeonu, the newly appointed Lord of Phenis, works to revitalize his devastated territory by convincing his reluctant manager, Johnny, to stay on for another year. He successfully secures construction funding and a protective order of knights from his master, a friendly Duke, to ensure the territory's stability. With the renovation plans underway, Hyeonu turns his attention to investigating the mysterious 9,000-strong 'Southern Star' army, setting the stage for his next infiltration mission.
key_moments: Hyeonu convinces Johnny to stay as the manager of Phenis by offering incentives including exotic food.
Jerry from the Gold Bug Merchants is hired to oversee the territory's construction.
The Duke visits to provide significant funding and an order of knights for the territory's protection.
Hyeonu decides to investigate the 'Southern Star' army as his next broadcast objective.
